models.intro: Register the models the AI uses. Besides Anthropic (Claude), add OpenAI or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (Sakura AI Engine, Groq, Ollama, …) just by entering a base URL. The active model is used across propose, Ask and every AI feature.
models.empty: No models yet. Add one with “+ Add model”.

form.name: Display name
form.rememberOn: The key is saved in localStorage and persists across reloads and restarts.
form.rememberOff: The key stays in sessionStorage only — cleared when the tab closes (never written to disk).
form.rateHelp: Input/output price per 1M tokens. Set it to estimate cost (without it, tokens are still tracked but cost shows “—”). There's no pricing API to auto-fetch current prices — check the provider's pricing page (JPY is fine).
form.cacheNote: Cache prices are derived from the input price (Anthropic: read 0.1×, write 1.25×; the OpenAI-compatible path uses no caching).

usage.placeholder: The usage dashboard ships in Phase C.
usage.intro: The server records the tokens used by each AI call; this tab aggregates them and estimates cost from your model rate table at display time.
usage.empty: No usage recorded yet. Running propose or Ask will record events.

gate.noModel: Configure a model to use AI.
gate.noKey: The active model has no API key set.
